title: Coach of the Year
summary: Coach of the Year CIRI shareholder Dan Leman recently was honored as ASAA’s Region II Coach of the Year. He is the girls basketball coach for the 2A Ninilchik Lady Wolverines. This is Leman’s third such award since he began coaching in 1990. He has also been named 1A/2A Coach of the Year seven times...
